title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0131 Land on South West side of Strathmore Road, Horfield, Bristol, BS7 9QQ
body: "Type of application:  Outline planning permission with all matters reserved  Applicant name:  Martin Thomas  Site address:  Land on South West side of Strathmore Road, Horfield, Bristol, BS7 9QQ  Description of proposed development:  Outline planning permission to make use of this underutilised site by creating a 1 bed 2 person dwelling house  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 7 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 11 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 2 January 2026   Decision date 29 December 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 201 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 11 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0131 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Planning Application Strathmore  (PDF, 6.83 MB, 12 pages)  BNG EXEMPTION BS7 9QQ  (PDF, 9.56 MB, 2 pages)  Design & Access Strathmore  (PDF, 5.13 MB, 16 pages)  Ecological Screening Assessment BS7 9QQ  (PDF, 71.8 MB, 2 pages)  Planning Portal Map  (PDF, 3.89 MB, 1 page)  UK Planning Maps  (PDF, 5.02 MB, 1 page)  Location Plan   (PDF, 3.85 MB, 1 page)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   DM21  (PDF, 249 KB, 1 page)  DM23  (PDF, 902 KB, 5 pages)  DM26 - Local Character and Distinctiveness 2  (PDF, 378 KB, 4 pages)  DM27  (PDF, 368 KB, 4 pages)  DM29  (PDF, 374 KB, 4 pages)  DM30 - Alterations to Existing Buildings  (PDF, 225 KB, 2 pages)  DM32 - Recycling and Refuse  (PDF,...
